input: Hey there! I noticed a couple of odd transactions on your account. No worries—just hit the link below to confirm your details and keep everything secure. https://secure-update.mybank.com/verify

Congratulations! You've been selected as a prize_winner in our annual sweepstakes. To claim your $5,000 prize, please verify your account by clicking the link below: https://secure-prizeclaim.com/verify

Subject: Important Notice Regarding Your Account

Dear User,

We have detected unusual login attempts on your account. To ensure your security, please verify your identity by clicking the link below within the next 24 hours:

https://secureverify.example.com/account/check

Failure to comply may result in temporary suspension of your account.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Support Team

Attention: Your bank account has been flagged for suspected fraud. If you do not confirm your identity within 24 hours, your account will be permanently closed. Access the secure portal now: https://bank-auth.verify/12345
